user_confirmations.workspace_dir: in-project default; added to .git/info/exclude as local-only
user_confirmations.rch_offload: use rch for >5min runs (workers: 1/2 healthy, 8 slots available)
user_confirmations.beads_commit_policy: author + polish locally; do NOT commit (per standing user policy)

known_ub_witnesses_to_anchor: linux_errno impl GetErrno for usize transmute (errno)
additional_anchor_findings: PUB-INSTALL-4 Tree.rs get_unchecked over attacker-controlled dep ID
bundler parallel-callback aliasing (5-site SB/TB cluster; later confirmed by EXP-010)
fmt::Raw safe-Display UTF-8 invariant violation (Section N primitive; Section C argv reachability not present on current main)
WebSocketClient::cancel re-entry missed in original (sibling was fixed)

constraints.build_command: bun bd (DO NOT timeout); locally bun bd --configure-only fails until clang-21+lld-21 are installed. Some cargo-direct Miri/sanitizer experiments also hit generated build_options.rs through bun_core, so prefer self-contained witnesses or rch/build-prereq setup until configure-only succeeds.
constraints.zig_files: *.zig siblings are reference-only, NOT compiled; ignore them as UB surface
constraints.vendor_dir: vendor/{boringssl,libuv,mimalloc,WebKit,...} out of Rust-UB scope but FFI boundaries ARE in scope
constraints.git_policy: no push without per-action authorization; no PR opens; no .beads/ commits without authorization
